specs.title: legacy saved-ticket records normalize without losing data
legacy shared links remain importable and do not restore sportsbook identity
ticket and active-view links navigate in the same page while remaining real links
adversarial action-menu navigation never leaves or stacks dashboard overlays
an open ticket view reacts to cross-tab storage edits and deletion
import modal owns focus, closes with Escape, and restores the trigger
phone and tablet layouts contain dashboard controls and overlays horizontally
